name: Vichyssoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and celery; cook for 5 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in leeks and cook for another 5 minutes.
4. Pour in chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
5. Gently add the sliced potatoes, stirring occasionally.
6. Simmer for about 20-25 minutes or until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork.
7. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
8. Transfer to a blender or food processor; puree until smooth.
9. Add soy sauce and stir to combine.
10. Return purée to pan, if needed, to thin consistency.
11. Stir in cream and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
12. Chill the soup completely before serving.
13. Garnish with chopped chives just before plating.
